title: 3d blocks n' stuff
description: modpack that adds 3d skin layers and 3d block textures
body: My first modpack! this modpacks uses 3d skins and 3d blocks to make minecraft look more detailed! this modpack is only for detail it does not change gameplay or anything else. this is the first version and it only supports cleint side, this mod is only for java 1.19.3 because classic 3d does not support any more recent versions.
